seoTitle: Turkey Hill vs Tutunup — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Turkey Hill and Tutunup. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Turkey Hill vs Tutunup: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Turkey Hill and Tutunup.
heading: Turkey Hill vs Tutunup — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Turkey Hill, Western Australia and Tutunup, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Turkey Hill has a lower overall climate risk score (39/100) compared to Tutunup (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Turkey Hill or Tutunup safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Turkey Hill has a flood risk score of 27/100, while Tutunup scores 25/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Turkey Hill scores 55/100 for bushfire risk. Tutunup scores 56/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Turkey Hill or Tutunup?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Turkey Hill has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.58% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
